name: Melon Grape Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the fruit with 1 tablespoon of lime juice and refrigerate, covered.
2. When ready to serve, pour out the liquid from the serving bowl, drying it thoroughly.
3. Whisk together the remaining lime juice, honey, and mustard in a separate bowl.
4. Toss the dried serving bowl with the fruit that has been mixed with the dressing.
